dashboard.topNota: The machine is the bottleneck: we prioritize what yields most per print hour.
dashboard.riesgoNota: Only own or commercially-licensed models are sold. CC-BY-NC and "Personal" are blocked.

config.subtitulo: These parameters govern the WHOLE catalog. Changing them here recalculates all prices instantly.
config.marcaDesc: Customize your instance's name, logo and colors (white-label).
config.guardadoOk: ✓ Settings saved. The catalog recalculated prices.

campos.costoFilamentoHint: if the filament isn't in the catalog
campos.potenciaHint: if the model has no printer assigned

integraciones.subtitulo: Connect Mercado Libre to import your sales history (feeds the forecast) and receive real-time events.
integraciones.errorConexion: Couldn't connect Mercado Libre. Check that the Redirect URI matches and try again.
integraciones.faltaAuth: Mercado Libre account authorization pending (one click).
integraciones.notaConectado: The sync brings recent paid orders into the database, for the forecast.
integraciones.notaNoConectado: Open this link in your Mercado Libre session and authorize the app once.
integraciones.webhooksDesc: ML sends every event here (sale, message, payment, shipping…). Endpoint:
